calendar.matters:
Petitioners Goldstone Financial Group, Llc, Anthony Pellegrino'S Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Out Of State Subpoena For Production Of Business Records [Per Agreement Of Parties]
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ruling: Petitioners Goldstone Financial Group, LLC, Anthony Pellegrino's Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Out Of State Subpoena For Production Of Business Records is denied and respondent Yelp Inc.'s request for monetary sanctions is also denied. The court adopts in full the recommendations and reasons for those recommendations in the report of Judge Pro Tem David McDonald. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600; Dept. 302.

Petitioners Goldstone Financial Group, Llc, Anthony Pellegrino'S Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Out Of State Subpoena For Production Of Business Records [Per Agreement Of Parties]
Off Calendar Mar-02-2018 Continued To Mar-22-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Howard D. Ruddell, Esq. of FAEGRE BAKER DANIELS, Tel. No. 310.500.2122, appearing for Plaintiffs Goldstone Financial Group, et al.;
William Frimel, Esq. of SEUBERT FRENCH FRIMEL & WARNER LLP, Tel. No. 650.322.3048, appearing for Defendant Yelp, Inc.

Defense counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem David McDonald.

Argument held. At the conclusion of argument, Petitioners Goldstone Financial Group, Llc and Anthony Pellegrino's Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Out Of State Subpoena For Production Of Business Records is continued to March 22, 2018 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Counsel are to provide new courtesy copies to Department 302 for the judge's review.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT/RBU)

PETITIONER GOLDSTONE FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC., ANTHONY PELLEGRINO's Petitioners' Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Out Of State Subpoena For Production Of Business Records.

To be heard on the discovery calendar on the same date at 9:00 a.m. in department 301.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

Petitioners Goldstone Financial Group, Llc., Anthony Pellegrino Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Out Of State Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Petitioners Goldstone Financial Group, Llc. and Anthony Pellegrino's Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Out Of State Subpoena For Production Of Business Records is continued to March 2, 2018 at 9:00 am per agreement of the parties.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT/HK)
